# HubRelay LLM Navigator

Single-file orientation for first-time onboarding and cross-file navigation.

## What this repository is

HubRelay is a monorepo for a command-control runtime and a dashboard:

- `sshbot` module at repository root: command daemon (`cmd/bot`) with plugins and egress control.
- `sdk/hubrelay`: Go client SDK for command execution and streaming.
- `hubcore`: shared dashboard library (auth/locale/shell), imported at build time.
- `apps/dashboard`: dashboard BFF service (`apps/dashboard/cmd/server`).
- `apps/dashboard/ui8kit`: reusable UI component toolkit.

`hubcore` is a library, not a running daemon.

## Start here (first read order)

1) `README.md` (root)
2) `docs/README.md` (global index)
3) `docs/overview/README.md`
4) `docs/getting-started/README.md`
5) `docs/architecture/README.md`
6) `docs/local-testing/README.md`
7) `docs/deploy/README.md`

## Open sections map

### Root
- `README.md` — one-page project commands, health checks, and links.
- `docs/README.md` — documentation index.
- `.project/README.md` — execution-model oriented project notes.
- `.project/architecture.md` — module boundaries and operational contracts.
- `.project/roadmap.md` — current direction and model constraints.
- `.project/wg/os-enforcement.md` — OS enforcement model (host-level egress fail-closed).
- `.project/wg/HUBRELAY_SYSTEM_GUIDE.md` — combined app/network mental model.
- `.project/wg/README.md` — private egress workflow overview.
- `.project/wg/egress-gateway/README.md` — Marvin gateway role.
- `.project/core-contracts.md` — protocol contracts.
- `.project/outbound-model.md` — shared outbound policy model.
- `.project/security-model.md` — safety and boundary notes.
- `.project/storage-model.md` — runtime state model and migration policy.
- `.project/deploy-model.md` — immutable image/binary behavior.
- `.project/threat-model.md` — concise threat view.
- `.project/profiles/tunnel-email-openai.md` — one concrete profile.
- `.project/adr/0001-immutable-deploy-profile.md`
- `.project/adr/0002-secrets-outside-runtime-state.md`
- `.project/adr/0003-bbolt-as-runtime-state.md`
- `.roadmap/sdk-relay-hub.md` — implementation recap and execution model.
- `.roadmap/checklist.md` — prioritized engineering plan.

- `apps/dashboard/ui8kit/docs/packages/utils.md`
- `apps/dashboard/ui8kit/docs/packages/styles.md`

## Onboarding command matrix

### Build and tests

```bash
go test ./...
go test ./hubcore/...
go test ./sdk/hubrelay/...
go test ./apps/dashboard/...
go test ./apps/dashboard/ui8kit/...
```

### Build binaries

```bash
go build ./cmd/bot
go build ./apps/dashboard/cmd/server
```

### Local dashboard setup

```bash
cd apps/dashboard
go mod tidy
npm install
npm run sync:ui8kit
npm run build:css
templ generate ./...
```

### Runtime checks

```bash
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5500/healthz
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5500/api/command \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"principal_id":"operator-local","roles":["operator"],"command":"capabilities"}'
```

### Egress/safety checks

```bash
INPUT_AI_API_KEY=<YOUR_KEY> INPUT_AI_BASE_URL=<BASE_URL> INPUT_AI_MODEL=<MODEL> INPUT_AI_API_MODE=chat_completions INPUT_PROXY_SESSION_ENABLED=false INPUT_PRIVATE_EGRESS_REQUIRED=true INPUT_PRIVATE_EGRESS_INTERFACE=wg0 INPUT_PRIVATE_EGRESS_TEST_HOST=10.88.0.1 INPUT_PRIVATE_EGRESS_FAIL_CLOSED=true go run ./cmd/bot
```

## For LLM context prioritization

- Prioritize `README.md`, `docs/README.md`, `docs/overview/README.md`, `docs/getting-started/README.md` first.
- Resolve architecture from `.project/architecture.md` and `.roadmap/sdk-relay-hub.md` next.
- Use `docs/*` for operational flow before reading any implementation details.
- For command contract details, start with `.project/core-contracts.md`, `docs/sdk.md`, and `docs/streaming.md`.
- For security boundaries, check `.project/security-model.md`, `.project/threat-model.md`, and `docs/security-and-privacy/README.md`.

## Index policy

Expose:
- `index`: `/README.md`
- `docs`: `/docs/README.md`
- `project`: `/.project/README.md`
- `roadmap`: `/.roadmap/checklist.md`
